name: construction finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate payment requests cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile subcontractor payment requests against contracts instead of manual reconciliation of payment requests against contracts.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payment requests leading to disputes and delayed payments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate payment requests leading to disputes and delayed payments.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate payment requests cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile subcontractor payment requests against contracts instead of manual reconciliation of payment requests against contracts.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of payment requests against contracts.
